postconditions: result == (facts.committed_head >= facts.previous_head && (facts.block_gas_limit == 0 || facts.block_gas_used <= facts.block_gas_limit) && facts.included_count != 0 && facts.included_count == facts.staged_count && facts.safe_included_count == facts.included_count)
acceptance_criteria: block commit is safe exactly when head is monotonic, gas evidence respects the configured limit, and included/staged/safe counts match for a nonempty batch

test_evidence.command: cargo test -p verified-core block_commit_requires_head_gas_and_batch_evidence && cargo test -p ic-evm-core produce_block_selects_top_k_by_fee_then_submission_order
